comment.body: Society makes investment for the future.  I suspect our society has gotten so 'over-financialized' with speculation that I wonder if our society is investing in negative benefit products.  An example would be common stock if the market were to fall.  Or even common stock if it doesn't benefit society.  I suspect in a time uncertain in the future, people will say, can you believe people used to pay hundreds of dollars for a single share of a common stock?!!
